positive: A highly detailed, symmetrical mythological creature constellation, featuring stylized bioluminescent flora and geometric astral netting. The design should be rendered in the style of a Neo-Art Deco woodcut etching combined with stained glass tessellation. Use a restricted palette of deep sapphire blues, vibrant teal, metallic gold, and stark negative space contrast. The central composition must feature the creature's silhouette framed by interlocking, repeating geometric patterns that suggest infinity and cosmic flow. Focus on sharp lines, high contrast, and clean, solid color fields suitable for screen printing. Central composition, full body shot, vaporwave aesthetic, intricate line work, symmetry, print-ready graphic.
